description: CompositionBrown T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron If your little one shares your belief that cricket without Sachin Tendulkar is no cricket at all, then flaunt your common belief in style with this tantra t-shirt. Team this cotton t-shirt with denim trousers or shorts and floaters, and walk with your head high in support of the Master Blaster.
